info.name: AddressGuru UAE — Plans API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for the Plans module (UAE / Dubai currency AED)

request.description: Returns all active, non-deleted plans sorted by displayOrder. Used for the frontend pricing/plans page.

response.name: 200 — Success
response.body:
{
  "status": true,
  "message": "Plans fetched successfully",
  "data": {
    "plans": [
      {
        "_id": "...",
        "name": "Free Plan",
        "slug": "free",
        "tagline": null,
        "displayOrder": 1,
        "currency": "AED",
        "price": 0,
        "billingCycle": "year",
        "features": ["Basic Listing", "100 Words Description", "No Website Link", "No Images Gallery", "Standard Ranking"],
        "limits": { "descriptionWords": 100, "businessImages": 0 },
        "flags": { "websiteLinkAllowed": false, "imagesGalleryAllowed": false },
        "theme": "default",
        "ctaLabel": "Get Started",
        "isHighlighted": false,
        "isActive": true
      }
    ]
  }
}

request.description: Fetch a single plan by its slug. Slugs: free | starter | growth | featured
Fetch a single plan by its MongoDB _id. Used internally when a listing references a plan.
One-time endpoint to seed the 4 default UAE plans (Free, Starter, Growth, Featured) with AED pricing. Will error if plans already exist.

response.name: 400 — Already Exists

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Premium Plan",
  "tagline": "New",
  "displayOrder": 5,
  "price": 999,
  "billingCycle": "year",
  "features": [
    "Everything in Featured",
    "Custom Banner",
    "API Access"
  ],
  "limits": {
    "descriptionWords": 2000,
    "businessImages": 20
  },
  "flags": {
    "websiteLinkAllowed": true,
    "imagesGalleryAllowed": true,
    "seoOptimised": true,
    "socialMediaLinks": true,
    "leadEnquiryForm": true,
    "performanceInsights": true,
    "verifiedBadge": true,
    "highlightBadge": true,
    "featuredInMainCities": true,
    "topOfSearchResults": true,
    "monthlyOptimisation": true,
    "dedicatedSupport": true,
    "priorityListing": true,
    "videoLinkAllowed": true
  },
  "theme": "gold",
  "ctaLabel": "Go Premium",
  "isHighlighted": false
}

request.description: Create a new plan. Requires admin auth. `price` is in AED.

body.raw:
{
  "price": 599,
  "tagline": "Most Popular",
  "isHighlighted": true,
  "features": [
    "SEO Optimised",
    "6 Business Images",
    "Social Media Links",
    "Lead Enquiry Form",
    "Performance Insights"
  ]
}

request.description: Update any fields of an existing plan. Only sends the fields you want to change.
Soft-deletes a plan (sets isDeleted=true, isActive=false). Existing listings referencing this plan are unaffected.
